reviews.comment:
La señora que limpia los baños muy amable. Los baños limpios . Agua caliente gratis. Y muy fácil acceso desde la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The lady who cleans the restrooms is very friendly. The restrooms are clean. Hot water is free. And it's very easy to access from the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2cnB6MVRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Llovía mucho y se llenó de agua adentro del bar, habría que corregir el problema, pero hubo muy buena predisposición de los empleados

(Translated by Google)
It was raining heavily and the bar filled with water; the problem would need to be fixed, but the employees were very helpful.
